title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports running local AI models directly inside the editor via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling on-machine coding assistants without relying on cloud APIs. This allows developers to use models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen-3.6 for code explanations, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while maintaining privacy.
